mapper.sql: id, header_id, bill_number, bill_id, bill_detail_id, organ_id, organ_name, material_id, material_name, material_spec, material_unit, material_count, material_price, material_amount, need_debt, remark, tenant_id, delete_flag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from jsh_reconciliation_item
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_reconciliation_item (header_id, bill_number, bill_id, bill_detail_id, organ_id, organ_name, material_id, material_name, material_spec, material_unit, material_count, material_price, material_amount, need_debt, remark, tenant_id, delete_flag) values (#{headerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{billNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{billDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialSpec,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{materialPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{materialAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{needDebt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into jsh_reconciliation_item
header_id,
bill_number,
bill_id,
bill_detail_id,
organ_id,
organ_name,
material_id,
material_name,
material_spec,
material_unit,
material_count,
material_price,
material_amount,
need_debt,
remark,
tenant_id,
delete_flag,

mapper.update:
update jsh_reconciliation_item
header_id = #{record.headerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bill_number = #{record.billNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bill_id = #{record.billId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bill_detail_id = #{record.billDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_id = #{record.organId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{record.organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_id = #{record.materialId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
material_name = #{record.materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_spec = #{record.materialSpec,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_unit = #{record.materialUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_count = #{record.materialCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
material_price = #{record.materialPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
material_amount = #{record.materialAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
need_debt = #{record.needDebt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{record.deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update jsh_reconciliation_item set header_id = #{record.headerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bill_number = #{record.billNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bill_id = #{record.billId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bill_detail_id = #{record.billDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_id = #{record.organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_name = #{record.organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_id = #{record.materialId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, material_name = #{record.materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_spec = #{record.materialSpec,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_unit = #{record.materialUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_count = #{record.materialCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, material_price = #{record.materialPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, material_amount = #{record.materialAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, need_debt = #{record.needDebt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{record.deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update jsh_reconciliation_item
header_id = #{headerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bill_number = #{billNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bill_id = #{billId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
bill_detail_id = #{billDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organ_name = #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_id = #{materialId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
material_name = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_spec = #{materialSpec,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_unit = #{materialUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
material_count = #{materialCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
material_price = #{materialPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
material_amount = #{materialAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
need_debt = #{needDebt,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_reconciliation_item set header_id = #{headerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bill_number = #{billNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bill_id = #{billId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, bill_detail_id = #{billDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organ_name = #{organName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_id = #{materialId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, material_name = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_spec = #{materialSpec,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_unit = #{materialUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, material_count = #{materialCount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, material_price = #{materialPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, material_amount = #{materialAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, need_debt = #{needDebt,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
